note: Seed data for generated GameMaker API IntelliSense. Expand with scripts/generate-gml-knowledge.mjs from official/manual-export or community JSON data.

builtins.name: draw_sprite
builtins.description: Draws a sprite at an x/y position.

builtins.name: draw_sprite_ext
builtins.signature: draw_sprite_ext(sprite, subimg, x, y, xscale, yscale, rot, colour, alpha)
builtins.description: Draws a sprite with scale, rotation, blend color, and alpha.

builtins.name: draw_text
builtins.description: Draws text at an x/y position.

builtins.name: draw_text_ext
builtins.description: Draws wrapped text with line spacing and width.

builtins.name: draw_set_font
builtins.description: Sets the active font for drawing text.

builtins.name: show_debug_message
builtins.description: Writes a value to GameMaker's debug output.

builtins.name: keyboard_check
builtins.description: Returns true while a key is held.

builtins.name: keyboard_check_pressed
builtins.description: Returns true on the frame a key is pressed.

builtins.name: keyboard_check_released
builtins.description: Returns true on the frame a key is released.

builtins.name: instance_create_layer
builtins.description: Creates an instance on a named layer.

builtins.name: instance_create_depth
builtins.description: Creates an instance at a depth.

builtins.name: instance_destroy
builtins.description: Destroys the current or targeted instance.

builtins.name: instance_exists
builtins.description: Returns whether an object or instance exists.

builtins.name: room_goto
builtins.description: Moves to a room.

builtins.name: audio_play_sound
builtins.description: Plays a sound resource.

builtins.name: array_push
builtins.description: Appends a value to an array.

builtins.name: array_length
builtins.description: Returns the number of entries in an array.

builtins.name: collision_rectangle
builtins.signature: collision_rectangle(x1, y1, x2, y2, obj, prec, notme)
builtins.description: Checks for an object in a rectangle.

builtins.name: point_distance
builtins.description: Returns the distance between two points.

builtins.name: lengthdir_x
builtins.description: Returns the x component for a length and direction.

builtins.name: lengthdir_y
builtins.description: Returns the y component for a length and direction.

builtins.name: sqr
builtins.description: Returns value multiplied by itself.

builtins.name: floor
builtins.description: Rounds a number down.

builtins.name: string
builtins.description: Converts a value to a string.

builtins.name: string_char_at
builtins.description: Returns the character at a 1-based index.

builtins.name: vk_enter
builtins.description: Enter key virtual-key constant.

builtins.name: vk_left
builtins.description: Left arrow virtual-key constant.

builtins.name: vk_right
builtins.description: Right arrow virtual-key constant.

builtins.name: c_white
builtins.description: White color constant.

builtins.name: c_black
builtins.description: Black color constant.

builtins.name: global
builtins.description: Global variable namespace.

builtins.name: self
builtins.description: The current instance.

builtins.name: other
builtins.description: The other instance in an event context.

builtins.name: image_number
builtins.description: Number of subimages in the current sprite.

builtins.name: sprite_index
builtins.description: Sprite assigned to the current instance.

builtins.name: x
builtins.description: Current instance x position.

builtins.name: y
builtins.description: Current instance y position.

events.name: Create
events.purpose: Initialize instance variables and setup state.

events.name: Step
events.purpose: Update movement, input, timers, and gameplay logic every frame.

events.name: Draw
events.purpose: Draw sprites, text, surfaces, and custom visuals.

events.name: Alarm
events.purpose: Run delayed logic when an alarm reaches zero.
